tables.name: subjects
tables.purpose: Subject-level cohort membership and baseline metadata needed to state who is in scope for the benchmark.
tables.row_grain: One row per subject enrolled in one cohort.

tables.name: visits
tables.purpose: Visit-level timing metadata for baseline and follow-up rows.
tables.row_grain: One row per subject visit within one cohort.

tables.name: diagnoses
tables.purpose: Diagnosis labels and grouping fields, including granularity and mapping caveats.
tables.row_grain: One row per diagnosis assertion for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: symptom_scores
tables.purpose: Symptom severity measurements and any harmonized symptom-domain scores.
tables.row_grain: One row per symptom measure for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: cognition_scores
tables.purpose: Cognitive task or scale measurements aligned to explicit domains.
tables.row_grain: One row per cognition measure for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: functioning_scores
tables.purpose: Functioning and recovery-relevant measurements used for outcome definition.
tables.row_grain: One row per functioning measure for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: treatment_exposures
tables.purpose: Treatment exposure rows that keep medication or intervention context explicit.
tables.row_grain: One row per treatment exposure record for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: outcomes
tables.purpose: Outcome rows that keep predictor timing, outcome timing, and prospective versus concurrent validity explicit.
tables.row_grain: One row per benchmark outcome definition for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: modality_features
tables.purpose: Feature rows emitted from one modality without assuming cross-cohort harmonization yet.
tables.row_grain: One row per modality feature for one subject at one visit.

tables.name: split_assignments
tables.purpose: Future split-assignment rows that can carry leakage controls without generating splits yet.
tables.row_grain: One row per subject assignment to one benchmark split protocol.
